---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new defense, attack pattern, integration, or improvement
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you'd like

One-sentence summary of the feature, defense, attack variant, or integration you'd like to see.

## Why

What problem does this solve? Is there a real-world incident, paper, or threat model that motivates it? Link sources if possible.

## What kind of contribution is this?

- [ ] New defense pattern (`src/agentic_security/defenses/`)
- [ ] New attack variant (`INJECTION_VARIANTS` in `src/agentic_security/scenario.py` or `data/injection_dataset.json`)
- [ ] New framework integration (LangChain, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, etc.)
- [ ] Notebook improvement
- [ ] Documentation / guide page
- [ ] Benchmark improvement
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Sketch

If you have a rough idea of how it would work — code shape, where it would live, what tests would prove it works — describe it here. A half-formed sketch is fine.

## Alternatives you've considered

Are there existing tools, defenses, or approaches that already do this? How would this addition be different or complementary?

## Are you willing to contribute it?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a PR
- [ ] I can help review but not implement
- [ ] I'm just suggesting it
